title: Pre-Inspection Package for Blood Establishments (FRM-0414) - Summary - Canada.ca
content:
## Pre-Inspection Package for Blood Establishments (FRM-0414) - Summary
The Pre-Inspection Package for Blood Establishments provides information and advice on:
- frequently asked questions on complying with the Blood Regulations
- the blood inspection process
- key elements of an inspection
- reporting errors and accidents to Health Canada
The document applies to registered establishments and establishments that only store, transfuse or transport blood (such as hospitals).
The document should be read along with the Guidance Document: Blood Regulations .
For a complete copy of FRM-0414, please contact the Biological Product Compliance Program .
